name: planner
description: Personal style-guide plugin for Bruno Chiaramonti's executive planning artifacts. Provides a dark-mode, typography-first design system (Georgia + Inter, terracota + azul petroleo palette, 3-column grid, zero ornament) applied automatically whenever personal planners, daily dashboards, journaling pages, or cron-generated HTML are produced. Scope is strictly personal artifacts — M7 corporate outputs use different design systems.
